tasks.subject: Task 1: Public error registry and request correlation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish typed public errors and server-generated request IDs.

**Files:** pkg/weberr/*, pkg/authn/errors.go, pkg/server/server.go, pkg/server/operations.go.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Every response has an untrusted-input-independent X-Request-ID; JSON errors are {code,details,requestId}; registry codes/detail schemas are unique and validated.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/weberr ./pkg/server ./pkg/authn -run 'RequestID|PublicError|Registry|WriteAuthErr' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/weberr","pkg/authn/errors.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/server/operations.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/weberr ./pkg/server ./pkg/authn -run 'RequestID|PublicError|Registry|WriteAuthErr' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["server-generated request IDs","typed public error envelope","validated unique registry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Safe request-ID diagnostic store and admin lookup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist curated seven-day diagnostics and expose exact-ID fresh-sudo lookup.

**Files:** db/migrations/029_diagnostic_event.sql, db/queries/diagnostic_event.sql, pkg/db, pkg/diagnostic, pkg/server/handle_admin_diagnostics*.go.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Records exclude secrets/raw causes; exact lookup requires fresh sudo, is rate-limited and audited; no bulk enumeration.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/diagnostic ./pkg/server -run 'Diagnostic|RequestID' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/029_diagnostic_event.sql","db/queries/diagnostic_event.sql","pkg/diagnostic","pkg/server/handle_admin_diagnostics.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/diagnostic ./pkg/server -run 'Diagnostic|RequestID' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["secret-safe diagnostics","fresh-sudo exact lookup","audited rate-limited access"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate backend failures to dedicated codes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Classify known backend failures with unique codes and curated details.

**Files:** pkg/authn/errors.go, pkg/account, pkg/credential, pkg/federation, pkg/protocol, pkg/server, pkg/weberr.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Known causes do not collapse into opaque shared errors; no server-localized message field; protocol-native mappings remain conformant; raw causes never become public details.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/account ./pkg/authn ./pkg/credential/... ./pkg/federation/... ./pkg/protocol/... ./pkg/server ./pkg/weberr -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/authn/errors.go","pkg/account","pkg/credential","pkg/federation","pkg/protocol","pkg/server","pkg/weberr"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/account ./pkg/authn ./pkg/credential/... ./pkg/federation/... ./pkg/protocol/... ./pkg/server ./pkg/weberr -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["dedicated stable error codes","curated detail schemas","protocol-compliant adapters"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Persistent localized frontend error panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace transient/raw API error UX with persistent localized code-driven panels.

**Files:** dashboard/src/components/custom/ErrorPanel.*, dashboard/src/lib/errors.*, dashboard/src/lib/api.*, dashboard/src/composables/useApi.*, dashboard/src/locales/*.ts, affected views.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Errors persist until dismissed/retried; details disclosure is accessible; request ID is copyable; admins can open exact diagnostics; locale coverage is complete.

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm test -- src/components/custom/ErrorPanel.test.ts src/lib/errors.test.ts src/lib/api.test.ts src/composables/useApi.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/ErrorPanel.vue","dashboard/src/lib/errors.ts","dashboard/src/lib/api.ts","dashboard/src/composables/useApi.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm test -- src/components/custom/ErrorPanel.test.ts src/lib/errors.test.ts src/lib/api.test.ts src/composables/useApi.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["persistent localized errors","accessible curated details","admin diagnostic navigation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Authenticated cursor and page foundations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define the uniform Page<T> wire contract and DEK-protected stateless cursors.

**Files:** pkg/pagination/*, pkg/contract/admin.go, pkg/server/operations.go.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Cursors bind collection/filter/sort/keyset and expire after 24h; limits clamp 1-100; final page has empty nextCursor.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/pagination ./pkg/contract ./pkg/server -run 'Cursor|Page|ClampLimit' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/pagination","pkg/contract/admin.go","pkg/server/operations.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/pagination ./pkg/contract ./pkg/server -run 'Cursor|Page|ClampLimit' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["authenticated bound cursors","uniform page envelope","bounded limits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Paginate top-level admin collections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert every top-level admin index to deterministic keyset pagination.

**Files:** db/queries/{account,enrollment,rbac,oidc,saml_sp,upstream_idp,credential_event}.sql, generated pkg/db, admin list handlers/tests.

**Acceptance Criteria:** All top-level indexes return Page<T>; stable limit+1 keysets; cursor/filter binding; no bare arrays.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server ./pkg/db -run 'List.*Page|Cursor|Admin.*List' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries","pkg/db","pkg/server"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server ./pkg/db -run 'List.*Page|Cursor|Admin.*List' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["all top-level indexes paginated","stable keysets","no bare arrays"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Paginate nested administrative collections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Paginate account, group, session, token, identity, and access-assignment collections.

**Files:** db/queries account/account_identity/personal_access_token/rbac/webauthn, generated pkg/db, pkg/session, nested server handlers/tests.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Every nested admin collection returns Page<T>; session scans are bounded; parent 404 semantics remain; cursors bind parent ID.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/session ./pkg/server -run 'Account.*Page|Group.*Page|Access.*Page|Session.*Page' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries","pkg/db","pkg/session","pkg/server"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/session ./pkg/server -run 'Account.*Page|Group.*Page|Access.*Page|Session.*Page' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["all nested collections paginated","bounded session scans","parent-bound cursors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Dashboard pagination integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Consume Page<T> across every admin dashboard collection.

**Files:** dashboard/src/lib/pagination.*, dashboard/src/composables/useCursorPage.*, dashboard/src/components/custom/PaginationControls.*, admin views/tests/locales.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Accessible next/previous navigation; cursor history; filter reset; mutation reload; picker options are not truncated.

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm test -- src/lib/pagination.test.ts src/composables/useCursorPage.test.ts src/components/custom/PaginationControls.test.ts src/pages/admin

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/pagination.ts","dashboard/src/composables/useCursorPage.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/PaginationControls.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm test -- src/lib/pagination.test.ts src/composables/useCursorPage.test.ts src/components/custom/PaginationControls.test.ts src/pages/admin","acceptanceCriteria":["all admin views consume pages","accessible navigation","no picker truncation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Per-IdP private-network configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the global bypass with audited per-IdP private fetching.

**Files:** db/migrations/030_upstream_idp_private_network.sql, db/queries/upstream_idp.sql, pkg/db, pkg/configx, pkg/federation/oidc, pkg/server, dashboard IdP views/locales.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Per-IdP default false; fresh-sudo and audit on change; global switch removed; client cache keys include policy; explicit UI warning.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/configx ./pkg/federation/oidc ./pkg/server -run 'PrivateNetwork|UpstreamIDP' -count=1 && cd dashboard && npm test -- src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/030_upstream_idp_private_network.sql","db/queries/upstream_idp.sql","pkg/configx","pkg/federation/oidc","pkg/server","dashboard/src/pages/admin"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/configx ./pkg/federation/oidc ./pkg/server -run 'PrivateNetwork|UpstreamIDP' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["per-IdP private policy","fresh-sudo audited changes","global bypass removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Exhaustive outbound unsafe-destination enforcement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enforce an exhaustive destination classifier on all outbound connections and redirects.

**Files:** pkg/federation/oidc/httpclient.go/tests, redirect tests, avatar fetch, cmd/prohibitorum metadata fetch/tests.

**Acceptance Criteria:** All special-use ranges classified; private mode permits only RFC1918/ULA; metadata/loopback always blocked; every DNS/dial hop screened.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc ./cmd/prohibitorum -run 'Outbound|Hardened|Redirect|Metadata|Avatar|PrivateNetwork' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/httpclient.go","pkg/federation/oidc/redirect_test.go","pkg/federation/oidc/avatar_fetch.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc ./cmd/prohibitorum -run 'Outbound|Hardened|Redirect|Metadata|Avatar|PrivateNetwork' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["exhaustive unsafe denylist","restricted private mode","every hop screened"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Atomic hashed refresh-family format
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace split plaintext token mappings with one CAS-updated hashed/encrypted family record.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go/tests, token/introspect/revoke, pkg/kv store/memory/redis/tests.

**Acceptance Criteria:** No usable token in KV; one authoritative CAS transition; identical grace retry successor; reuse revokes family; legacy tokens invalid.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/kv ./pkg/protocol/oidc -run 'Refresh|CAS|Introspect|Revoke' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh_test.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/introspect.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/revoke.go","pkg/kv"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/kv ./pkg/protocol/oidc -run 'Refresh|CAS|Introspect|Revoke' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["hashed-at-rest tokens","atomic rotation","reuse family revocation","legacy invalidation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Refresh lifetime and originating-session enforcement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add absolute/inactivity limits and bind refresh authority to the live originating session and current authorization.

**Files:** pkg/configx, pkg/session, pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go/tests, server recovery/revocation handlers/tests.

**Acceptance Criteria:** 30-day inactivity and 90-day absolute defaults; live session checked; definitive session/account/access/recovery denial revokes family; precise audit reasons.

**Verify:** mise exec -- go test ./pkg/configx ./pkg/session ./pkg/protocol/oidc ./pkg/server -run 'Refresh|Session.*Revoke|Recovery|Access.*Revok|Absolute|Inactivity' -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/configx","pkg/session","pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh_test.go","pkg/server"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/configx ./pkg/session ./pkg/protocol/oidc ./pkg/server -run 'Refresh|Session.*Revoke|Recovery|Access.*Revok|Absolute|Inactivity' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["absolute and inactivity expiry","live originating session binding","security-state revocation"]}
```
